metadata.title:
SPOKANE GAS COMPANY


TO HAVE new OWNER

Isaac Anderson Of Philadelphia. Announces Completion of
Negotiations With Hopper Estate. Which Now Con-


trolls Nine Tenths of Stock.

pages.raw_text:
that the books be turned over to him
on the strength Of telegram in his
possession from Philadelphia. The
message stated the money had been
paid and the transfer made Of the
Hopper interests in this company. I
do not doubt it's correctness and have
known the deal was on for some time.


II can not surrender control here,
however, until officially notified from
the east, which expect to be before
the end Of the week. know nothing
as to the price paid for our stock nor
as to the future plans Of the new
company"


Mr.. Hopper stated he would leave
Spokane and go into business else
where as soon as relieved here.
Where, he did not now know.


HuNTIN0ToM's STOCK.


He also stated the Washington
Water Power company had no inter-
est in the new company and further
stated that they never had owned a
share of stock in the old company.
He said on this point:


Mr. Huntington of the Water
Power company owned one share in
our company and I owned one share
in their concern. We owned this stock
to get each others official statement
We have now traded our shares and
he nor his company will have no in
terest in the new company"
